epics.title: Quality hardening & audit
epics.description: Audit Fenrir, compress agents, dogfood couche-0, add delivery skills.

epics.title: Tech Lead surface
epics.description: Give a tech lead a read/govern surface over the standard.

epics.title: Fenrir v1.4 — capability extension
epics.description: New generic dev skills + tech-specific skills + Azure live-ops skills/agents + dashboard flow-metrics. Goals: tech-lead time, project mgmt, quality, speed.

epics.title: Auto-tracked sessions
epics.description: Sessions auto-tracked by the delivery-tracking hooks. Re-parent / rename via the delivery-tracker subagent.

epics.title: Multi-agent cost/speed/quality efficiency
epics.description: Reduce context volume × model tier (the real cost driver), make waste visible, codify tiering. Cache is already 10x efficient — lever is volume + tier.

features.title: Azure live-ops skills
features.description: Operate a LIVE subscription via the az MCP (vs codegen)

features.title: Azure specialized agents
features.description: Azure-domain experts using the az MCP live

features.title: Dashboard flow-metrics
features.description: Prereq: board has no status-transition history today

features.title: Automatic + enforced delivery tracking
features.description: Auto-create Epic/Feature/US + auto-attribute cost via hooks; block commits not traced to a US; subagent does the smart breakdown. skills advise, infra enforces.

stories.title: 209 hook behavior tests
stories.i_want: the 9 hooks tested
stories.so_that: a regression can't silently disable the gate

stories.title: Tech Lead report (gate/exceptions/onboarding)
stories.i_want: one honest report per repo
stories.so_that: I see arming, exceptions and drift at a glance

stories.title: Telemetry -> work_log cross-link
stories.i_want: real tokens/cost on a story

stories.title: Replace demo seed with the real board
Deep-research feature gaps
stories.i_want: cited evidence of high-value delivery features
stories.so_that: we build what moves DORA/SPACE, not guesses

stories.title: Design & red-team skill catalog
stories.i_want: a dedup-checked, prioritized catalog

stories.title: refactor skill
stories.i_want: behavior-preserving restructuring with tests green before+after
stories.so_that: I change structure without breaking behavior

stories.title: simplify skill (DRY/KISS)
stories.i_want: DRY+KISS reduction tied to the quality tier

stories.title: optimize skill
stories.i_want: optimize under a stated constraint, measure-first

stories.title: report skill (session report)
stories.i_want: a session report: files/decisions/tests/cost/board
stories.so_that: I see what a session produced

stories.title: explain skill (didactic)
stories.i_want: pedagogical code explanation, tunable depth

stories.title: database skill (modeling/queries/indexing)
stories.i_want: data modeling + query/index design (not migrations)

stories.title: kb skill (knowledge-base lifecycle)
stories.i_want: ingestion/chunking/freshness/citations atop retriever
stories.so_that: the KB stays fresh and cited

stories.title: azure-deploy skill
stories.i_want: end-to-end live deploy+verify+rollback via az MCP

stories.title: Status-transition log on board model
stories.i_want: every status move timestamped

stories.title: Cycle-time / WIP / throughput metrics
stories.i_want: flow metrics + Monte-Carlo throughput forecast

stories.title: delivery-tracker subagent (smart breakdown)
stories.i_want: a subagent that turns a diff+telemetry into Epic/Feature/US/Task and attributes cost
stories.so_that: tracking is authored well, not by hand

stories.title: track_session.py engine (ensure-us/collect/finalize/check)
stories.i_want: a deterministic engine the hooks call

stories.title: Auto hooks: SubagentStop + SessionEnd + SessionStart
stories.i_want: subagent runs + session cost auto-attributed

stories.title: tracking-guard.py — block untraced git commit
stories.i_want: commits refused unless traced to a US
acceptance_criteria: deny on git commit when untraced
fail-open + env opt-out, scoped to commit

stories.title: CI delivery-trace required check
stories.i_want: PR fails unless change maps to a US

stories.title: Hook tests + docs + bookkeeping
stories.i_want: tests for the new hooks + updated README/CHANGELOG

stories.title: v1.4 session — interleaved remainder (build/red-team/main; not atomic)
stories.so_that: the session's real spend is visible on the board

stories.title: Cache-efficiency dashboard view (savings, hit-ratio, uncached-equiv)
stories.i_want: to see cache hit-ratio + uncached-equivalent savings per model/agent
stories.so_that: I target what actually wastes context

stories.title: workflow-efficiency skill (model tiering + prompt budget + fan-out caps)
Per-US cost reconcile (subagent time-sweep + main delta) + rollup
stories.i_want: every spend attributed to a specific US with Epic=ΣFeatures=ΣUS rollup
stories.so_that: cost management is real and mandatory
acceptance_criteria: subagent runs → US active when they ran

stories.title: Agile atomic-US doctrine + hygiene audit gate
stories.i_want: US flagged when not atomic + the tracker to author atomic US
acceptance_criteria: audit flags cost> or >40% of epic
